nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Use this to test. Change to 'Schedule Trigger' for daily runs

nodes.name: Read Prospects
nodes.notes: Reads all prospects from your Excel/Sheet data

parameters.twiml: =<Response><Say voice="Polly.Aditi">Hello {{ $json['Contact Name'] || $json.Name || 'there' }}, this is [YOUR_NAME] from [YOUR_COMPANY]. I noticed {{ $json['Company Name'] || 'your business' }} doesn't have a website yet. I'd love to help you get online and attract more customers. Please call me back at [YOUR_PHONE] or visit [YOUR_WEBSITE]. Thank you!</Say></Response>

nodes.name: Make Automated Call
nodes.notes: Sends pre-recorded voice message. For live calls, use click-to-call or manual dial with script.

parameters.twiml:
=<Response>
  <Pause length="2"/>
  <Say voice="{{ $json.voice }}" language="{{ $json.language }}">
    Hello, this is [YOUR_NAME] from [YOUR_COMPANY]. 
    I'm calling for {{ $json.companyName }} in {{ $json.location }}. 
    I noticed you have excellent customer reviews, {{ $json.rating }} stars, but I couldn't find your website when searching online. 
    Many customers in {{ $json.country }} search Google before visiting businesses. Without a website, you might be losing potential customers to competitors. 
    I'd love to help you build a professional website and establish your online presence. 
    Please call me back at [YOUR_PHONE] or visit [YOUR_WEBSITE]. Thank you and have a great day!
  </Say>
  <Pause length="1"/>
  <Say voice="{{ $json.voice }}" language="{{ $json.language }}">Goodbye!</Say>
</Response>
